name: cc
description: Claude Code Plugin for Codex. Delegate code reviews, investigations, and tracked tasks to Claude Code from inside Codex.

interface.longDescription: Use Claude Code from inside Codex to run read-only reviews, adversarial design reviews, and tracked rescue tasks through a Claude-backed runtime with job status and result retrieval.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude Code to review my current changes through $cc:review
Use Claude Code to challenge this implementation through $cc:adversarial-review
Use Claude Code to investigate and fix this issue through $cc:rescue
